items.name: Plastic bottle
items.instructions: Rinse to remove liquids, remove the cap if required by your local program, and place in the plastic recycling bin.

items.name: Cardboard box
items.instructions: Flatten the box, remove any plastic tape or labels if possible, and place in the paper/cardboard recycling bin.

items.name: Glass jar
items.instructions: Empty and lightly rinse, remove metal lids where required, and place in the glass recycling container.

items.name: Aluminium can
items.instructions: Empty, quickly rinse, and place in the metal recycling bin. Do not crush unless recommended by your local program.

items.name: Banana peel
items.instructions: Place in a food waste bin or compost container. Do not mix with regular recycling.

items.name: Household battery
items.instructions: Never place batteries in regular trash or recycling. Store in a sealed container and take to a designated battery or e‑waste collection point.
